name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, regulatory changes cause compliance risks. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking of regulatory updates.
problem_solved: Keeping up with regulatory changes for multiple clients
